wizard.err.answers_missing_metadata: answers file is missing wizard metadata; rerun with --migrate to import legacy answers
wizard.err.invalid_schema_version: invalid schema version; expected semantic version like 1.0.0
wizard.err.latest_policy_invalid: latest_policy must be keep_latest or pin when :latest refs are used
wizard.err.latest_policy_pin_failed: could not pin :latest reference to a resolved digest
wizard.err.latest_policy_required: wizard answers include :latest refs; set latest_policy to keep_latest or pin
wizard.qa.assistant_template_source: Where to load the assistant template from
wizard.qa.assistant_template_source.desc: Assistant template source: use an absolute path, relative path, oci://, repo://, or store:// reference.
wizard.qa.bundle_id.description: Stable machine-readable identifier, typically lowercase with hyphens.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode: What do you want to do with this bundle?
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.create.description: Create a fresh bundle configuration and handover output.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.create.label: Create bundle
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.doctor.description: Inspect and repair bundle configuration issues without changing the workflow type.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.doctor.label: Doctor bundle
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.update.description: Refresh bundle inputs and outputs for an existing bundle setup.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.update.label: Update bundle
wizard.qa.bundle_name.description: Human-readable name used when presenting the generated bundle.
wizard.qa.bundle_output_path.description: Final .gtbundle file path to produce during bundle handover.
wizard.qa.deployment_profile.description: Named deployment profile to attach to the generated bundle handover.
wizard.qa.deployment_target.description: Target environment or platform, for example local, dev, or prod.
wizard.qa.domain_template_source: Where to load the domain template from
wizard.qa.domain_template_source.descrip: Domain template source: use an absolute path, relative path, oci://, repo://, or store:// reference.
wizard.qa.latest_policy.keep_latest.desc: Preserve the moving :latest tag and re-resolve it in future runs.
wizard.qa.latest_policy.pin.description: Resolve :latest now and store the concrete digest for deterministic replay.
wizard.qa.latest_policy.pin.label: Pin resolved digest
wizard.qa.output_dir: Where to write generated bundle files
wizard.qa.output_dir.description: Directory where generated bundle artefacts should be written. The final bundle file will be written to ./dist/<bundle-id>.gtbundle inside this directory.
wizard.qa.provider_categories.descriptio: Comma-separated provider categories such as llm, search, or storage.
wizard.qa.template_output_path: Where to write the template file
wizard.qa.template_output_path.descripti: Where the generated template JSON should be written.
wizard.qa.template_source: Where to load the template from
wizard.qa.template_source.description: Template source: use an absolute path, relative path, oci://, repo://, or store:// reference.
wizard.qa.title: GX Wizard
wizard.qa.workflow.assistant_bundle.desc: Build bundle handover inputs that combine assistant, domain, and provider settings.
wizard.qa.workflow.assistant_template_cr: Generate a new assistant template JSON file from a source reference.
wizard.qa.workflow.assistant_template_up: Refresh an existing assistant template output from a source reference.
wizard.qa.workflow.domain_template_creat: Generate a new domain template JSON file from a source reference.
wizard.qa.workflow.domain_template_updat: Refresh an existing domain template output from a source reference.
wizard.step.collect_input: Collect wizard inputs and load answer state
wizard.step.normalize_request: Normalise request into deterministic wizard input
